texto: Like a Shakespearean sonnet that captures the very essence of love, or a painting that brings out the beauty of the human form that is far more than just skin deep, Euler’s equation reaches down into the very depths of existence.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Keith J. Devlin: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Like a Shakespearean sonnet that captures the very essence of love, or a painting that brings out…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, math, mathematics pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mathematics.
